projects.title: Traycer
projects.description: Advanced mobile application for tracking and analyzing user behavior patterns with real-time analytics.

challenges.title: Real-time Data Processing
challenges.description: Implementing efficient real-time data processing for millions of events per second while maintaining low latency and high accuracy.

challenges.title: Cross-platform Performance
challenges.description: Optimizing performance across iOS and Android platforms with different hardware capabilities and OS limitations.

challenges.title: Privacy and Security
challenges.description: Ensuring user data privacy and security while providing detailed analytics and insights.

solutions.title: Event Streaming Architecture
solutions.description: Implemented Apache Kafka-based event streaming system with partitioned topics for parallel processing and load balancing.

solutions.title: Native Performance Optimization
solutions.description: Used React Native's native modules for performance-critical operations and implemented platform-specific optimizations.

solutions.title: End-to-End Encryption
solutions.description: Implemented AES-256 encryption for data at rest and TLS 1.3 for data in transit, with user-controlled data retention policies.

features.title: Real-time Analytics
features.description: Monitor user behavior patterns and interactions in real-time with comprehensive dashboards.

features.title: Predictive Insights
features.description: AI-powered predictions and recommendations based on historical data and machine learning models.

features.title: Privacy First
features.description: Enterprise-grade security with user-controlled data sharing and privacy settings.

features.title: Cross-platform
features.description: Seamless experience across iOS and Android with native performance and platform-specific features.

otherProjects.title: Portfolio V3.0
otherProjects.description: Modern portfolio website with React 18, TypeScript, and Framer Motion animations.

otherProjects.title: TaskMaster Pro
otherProjects.description: Project management tool with team collaboration features and real-time updates.

otherProjects.title: Weather Dashboard
otherProjects.description: Beautiful weather application with detailed forecasts and interactive maps.
